title: Adding excel sheet to an existing group (not board)
excerpt:
Hi! 
I exported a group from Monday to an excel spreadsheet. I am trying import that same sheet into the same group in the same board. EX: 2024 Board-> Payments-> ABC company group. This group already has various rows an…

posts.author: thebigplan (thebigplan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I exported a group from Monday to an excel spreadsheet. I am trying import that same sheet into the same group in the same board. EX: 2024 Board-> Payments-> ABC company group. This group already has various rows and columns, however, i had to add a lot more information hence i exported it to excel to make it more seamless. Every time i try importing this sheet into Monday again, nothing is updating besides for a new group being created.
Thank you in advance!

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,
Why do you just add these rows/columns to a board? What’s the purpose of exporting it to excel?
For now you can use Smart Spreadsheet app to automatically feed your board into a spreasheet without leaving monday. Updates on a board are reflected in a spreadsheet.
Very soon, we’ll release a feature in the Smart Spreadsheet app that allows you to automatically send updates from a spreadsheet back to Monday.

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @thebigplan

If you’re still looking for this, then you can import an Excel/CSV into an existing group with the monday app Data Importer

I’ve put together a tutorial specifically for this too.

I hope it helps, do feel free to reach out if any questions!

James
